mapper.sql: id, target_type, target_id, bucket_type, biz_path, file_url, object_key, original_name, content_type, file_size, width, height, sort_order, created_time, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_image_resource ( target_type, target_id, bucket_type, biz_path, file_url, object_key, original_name, content_type, file_size, width, height, sort_order, created_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{bucketType}, #{bizPath}, #{fileUrl}, #{objectKey}, #{originalName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{width}, #{height}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdTime}, 0 )
